services.title: Everything your home needs, all in one place
services.intro: Carpentry, plumbing, painting, electrical, and much more. We take care of every job so you don't have to shop around.
services.singleStrong: We're ready for the job you need.
services.singleRest: From a small fix to a full upgrade, we make sure it's done right.
descriptions: Furniture, doors, shelving, adjustments, and general woodwork.
Repairs, installations, leaks, faucets, and pipe maintenance.
Interior and exterior painting, touch-ups, surface prep, and finishes.
Installations, inspections, lighting, outlets, and basic repairs.
Walls, floors, plastering, repairs, tiling, and minor building work.
Deep cleaning, post-construction, maintenance, and space prep.
Pruning, lawns, irrigation, upkeep, and green-space recovery.
Lockouts, lock changes, key copies, security, and emergencies.
Installation, maintenance, cleaning, and full unit inspection.
Glass replacement, shower screens, windows, mirrors, and aluminum fitting.
Repair, renewal, and reupholstery of furniture, chairs, and headboards.
General improvements for bathrooms, kitchens, bedrooms, and home spaces.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.intro: The most common questions before you request your quote.

items.q: What kind of work do you do?
items.a: Repairs, maintenance, installations, and improvements across different areas of the home: carpentry, plumbing, painting, electrical, masonry, and more.

items.q: Do you take on small fixes or only big projects?
items.a: Both. We're ready for a one-off repair as well as a full home improvement.

items.q: Are the photos and videos real jobs?
items.a: Yes. Some spots are still reserved for material; as they're published, you'll see real photos and videos of finished jobs for each area.

items.q: What details do I need to request a quote?
items.a: Your name, phone, email, the service you need, and a short description of the problem or improvement you're after. That's all it takes to get started.

items.q: Why don't I see prices on the site?
items.a: Because every job is different. The price is agreed with you based on what you need, and asking costs nothing and commits you to nothing.

cta.title: Request your quote, no strings attached
cta.intro: Tell us which service you need and describe the problem or the improvement. We'll get back to you to schedule the visit by WhatsApp, call, or email.
cta.successBody: Thanks for reaching out. We'll get back to you as soon as possible to schedule the visit.
cta.labelDescription: Tell us the problem or the improvement
cta.error: The message couldn't be sent. Please try again or message us on WhatsApp.
cta.note: Asking costs nothing and commits you to nothing.
